calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Aug-26-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for default prove-up hearing. Judge: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Mary Hinds; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. Plaintiff represented by and through her counsel, Patrick McMahon, Esq. presents evidence. Good cause appearing, the Court signs judgment for plaintiff in the total sum of $33,462.55 (see imaged document). Judgment signed in open court.
